checks.name: Mobile Devices that Process Store or Transmit CUI are Identified
checks.purpose: Identification of mobile devices that process store or transmit CUI is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: Mobile Device Connections are Authorized
checks.purpose: Authorization of mobile device connections is an organizational GRC documentation concern covering MDM enrollment policy and device compliance requirements not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: Mobile Device Connections are Monitored and Logged
checks.purpose: Verify that mobile device connections via Bluetooth and USB are logged via Windows audit policy and that removable device connection events are captured in the Security or System event log

checks.name: Mobile Devices that Process Store or Transmit CUI are Identified
checks.purpose: Identification of mobile devices that process store or transmit CUI is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: Mobile Device Connections are Authorized
checks.purpose: Authorization of mobile device connections is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: Mobile Device Connections are Monitored and Logged
checks.purpose: Verify that removable device and USB connection events are captured in Windows audit logs, Bluetooth is disabled or restricted via Group Policy, and device installation events are logged

checks.name: Mobile Devices that Process Store or Transmit CUI are Identified
checks.purpose: Identification of mobile devices that process store or transmit CUI is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: Mobile Device Connections are Authorized
checks.purpose: Authorization of mobile device connections is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: Mobile Device Connections are Monitored and Logged
checks.purpose: Verify that USB and Bluetooth device connection events are captured via auditd or udev rules and that system logs record mobile device attachment and detachment events
